Build 007 · Revenue Cycle

Turn completed transportation into clean, traceable revenue.

Create invoices and claim drafts, track payer requirements, post payments, reconcile balances and export financial activity from the same trip record.

One source of financial truth

Booking, NIPE pricing, trip operations and billing now share the same trip reference and amount.

$0.00Gross charges
$0.00Payments posted
$0.00Accounts receivable
100%Clean-claim readiness
Claim controls

Revenue-cycle actions

Revenue cycle is ready.

Payer workflow

  • Self-pay: invoice and hosted checkout
  • Facility: account invoice and terms
  • Medicaid/insurance: CMS-1500 draft and claim review
  • Workers’ compensation: authorization and adjuster tracking

Clean-claim checklist

  • Patient and payer identity
  • Service date and trip reference
  • Medical necessity documentation
  • Authorization/member identifiers
  • Approved rates and charge amount
Claims work queue

Invoices and claim drafts

Review every financial record before sending it to a payer or customer.

Hosted checkout

Customers can pay through existing secure hosted payment pages.
